title: Policy: Policy applied - Logout - Settings stay locked
scenario: Policy-locked settings remain inaccessible after user logs out of tenant in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in to a tenant account that has a policy applied to a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected device to open Device Settings.
4. Verify that certain settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are locked/grayed out as per the applied policy.
5. Log out of the tenant account from the Account screen.
6. After logging out, return to the Home screen and select the same device to open Device Settings.
7. Observe the previously locked settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
expected: After logging out of the tenant, settings that were locked by the policy should become unlocked and accessible in the app.
